\begin{titlepage}
\setcounter{page}{1}
\begin{singlespace}
\center
\vspace*{48pt}

\textbf{Augmented vs. Traditional Instruction}\\
\textbf{in Manufacturing Assembly:}
\\
\textbf{An Affordance-Based, Multi-Modal Assessment}\\
\textbf{of Learning, Recall, and Retention}
\vspace{12pt}

by \\
\vspace{12pt}
Danny J. O'Leary
\vspace{48pt}

A dissertation submitted to the Graduate Faculty of \\
Auburn University \\
in partial fulfillment of the \\
requirements for the Degree of \\
Doctor of Philosophy \\
\vspace{12pt}

Auburn, Alabama \\
***GRADUATION DATE*** %TODO
\vspace{48pt}

Keywords: ***Insert up to six key words or phrases*** \\ %TODO
***on no more than two lines*** %TODO
\vspace{24pt}

Copyright 2024 by Danny J. O'Leary
\vspace{24pt}

***Approved by*** %TODO
\vspace{12pt}

Dr. Gregory Harris, Co-chair, Assoc. Professor \& Chair, Industrial \& Systems Engineering \\
Dr. John Evans, Co-chair, Professor, Industrial \& Systems Engineering \\
Dr. Richard Sesek, Professor, Industrial \& Systems Engineering \\
Dr. Konstantinos Mykoniatis, Assistant Professor, Industrial \& Systems Engineering

\end{singlespace}
\end{titlepage}
